metadata.description: Projected-cost CEM smoke test. Default LeWM final candidate pools are simulator-scored once per pair; projected endpoint metrics reuse those labels; projected CEM executes only the rank-1 final action.

projection_config.fixed_scope: one matrix per (m, projection_seed), reused across all pairs and CEM iterations

endpoint_metric_pool.source: default LeWM final CEM iteration 300-candidate pool

sign_reversal.description: negative C_real_z vs C_real_state per-pair Spearman pairs

v1_favorable.description: V1-favorable D3xR0 and D3xR3 cells from Track A metadata

ordinary.description: Complement of invisible_quadrant, sign_reversal, latent_favorable, and v1_favorable

projection_matrix.fixed_scope: fixed per (dimension, projection_seed) across pairs and CEM iterations
